steps.t: Laerdan is on the other side of the cave at Gath Forthnír. Golodir instructed you to speak with Laerdan to learn how you can help him track down Amart…
Calenglad is at the Ranger-camp at Tinnudir on the eastern shore of Lake Evendim. Laerdan instructed you to go to the Ranger-camp in Evendim to speak …
